title: Council of Reserve Forces’ and Cadets’ Associations Scrutiny Team annual statutory report: 2025
body: "The Council of Reserve Forces’ and Cadets’ Associations (CRFCA) gives advice and assistance to the Defence Council and the Royal Navy, Army, and Royal Air Force on matters that concern reserves and cadets.  This report provides an in-depth analysis of the current state, challenges, and advancements within the UK reserve forces. "
